case_title: VINTHER, KELLEY VS FRIVERT, GUNTER IND/DBA POMP & CIRCUMSTANCE

docket_entries.description: DEFT.FILING ORDERED CONTINUANCE FOR 3/16/00 AT 3:30PM,PAID $10 CASH,FOLDER FOR COMM'S SIG. (CAL:20-1).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VINTHER, KELLEY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FRIVERT, GUNTER IND/DBA POMP & CIRCUMSTANCE PLAINTIFF TO PICK UP RUG FROM DEFENDANT WHICH WAS PURCHASED IN 1998. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SENT COPY TO BOTH PARTIES W/NOTE TO MOVING PARTY: TO WAIT AT LEAST 15 DAYS.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-18-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-16-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLTF'S MAILED REQUEST FOR MOTION FOR RECONSIDERA - TION,PAID $14 CHECK,SENT COPY W/NOTE"WAIT AT LEAST 15 DAYS". FOLDER TO COMMISSIONER.
DECLARATION OF GUENTER FRIVERT RE: OPPOSITION TO PLFT'S REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDMENT FILED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $368.90 FILED BY VINTHER, KELLEY AS TO DEFENDANT FRIVERT, GUNTER IND/DBA POMP & CIRCUMSTANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-18-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FRIVERT, GUNTER IND/DBA POMP & CIRCUMSTANCE
PLFT'S REQUEST FOR MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION DENIED BY COMM. NOTICED SENT TO BOTH PARTIES.
